[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010001000 2
1 111001111 7
2 000001001 2
3 011111010 6
4 011111100 6
5 000110101 4
6 001010010 3
7 111111111 a

01 10 111111111 a match 7
12 21 111111111 a match 7
23 32 100111111 7
34 43 010111100 5
45 54 110101011 6
56 65 111001011 6
67 76 111101111 8
70 07 110101111 7

02 20 110111011 7
13 31 111111111 a match 7
24 42 110111011 7
35 53 100111111 7
46 64 111101010 6
57 75 110101111 7
60 06 111101010 6
71 17 111111111 a match 7

03 30 110111110 7
14 41 111111111 a match 7
25 52 100110011 5
36 63 111111110 8
47 74 110101101 6
50 05 110101011 6
61 16 111011111 8
72 27 110111111 8

04 40 110101010 5
15 51 111011111 8
26 62 111111011 8
37 73 110111101 7
